title: Dark Green Satin Ribbon, 25mm x 22m, Double Sided, Perfect for Gift Wrapping, Christmas, Wedding, Crafts & Decorations
features: 🎀MATERIALS: Ribbon Satin Ribbon Set are made of polyester fabric, smooth and comfortable texture.
🎁SIZE&PACKAGE: One Ribbon rolls Width:25mm /Length: 22m,Total length about: 22 meters,Variety of colors are available for all your needs.

🎀WIDELY USE: Satin Ribbon 25mm Wide Good for many type of craft and decoration such as Christmas craft and present wrapping, scrapbook, packaging design, Christmas tree,clothing, hair bows,hair accessories, card making, gift packaging, party favor, hair bow, sewing, floral projects.
🎁EASY TO USE: Solid Fabric Ribbons Roll will fray when cut. Our best tip for cutting ribbon is to use really good quality scissors (new if possible) and cut the ribbon at an angle.

🎀100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: After Sale Service If you have any issue about Ribbon for Gift Wrapping please contact us at any time, we will answer you within 24 hours and find a best solution for you.
description: PRODUCT INFORMATION: Package list: 1 Rolls Satin Ribbon Ribbon 25mm for Gift Wrapping: Ribbon Rolls perfect for sewing, gift wrapping, home decorating, floral arrangement,hair bow hair decorations, ribbon hair ties, ribbon award and many more ribbon crafting projects. USE NOTE: All fabric ribbon will fray when cut. Our best tip for cutting ribbon is to use really good quality scissors (new if possible) and cut the ribbon at an angle.
